title: useColorMode
description: Reactive singleton for managing light / dark / system color mode. Persists the choice to localStorage, toggles the `.dark` class on the html element, and reacts to OS `prefers-color-scheme` changes.

props.mode: The raw chosen mode — `'light'`, `'dark'` or `'system'`. Writable: assigning a new value triggers persistence and class application.
props.resolved: Always a concrete `'light'` or `'dark'`. When `mode` is `'system'`, it tracks the OS preference reactively.
props.set: Programmatically change the mode and persist it to localStorage.
props.toggle: Flip between light and dark. If currently `'system'`, it toggles relative to the resolved value.

basic.title: Basic reading
basic.desc: Read `resolved` and `isDark` to adapt UI styling.

toggle.title: Toggle button
toggle.desc: Use `toggle()` to flip between light and dark with a single button.

system.title: Follow OS preference
system.desc: Set `mode` to `'system'` so the app mirrors the user's OS theme choice.
